title: T3 Ingestion: Build tools/style-check.py — automated ratification checklist
prompt: Build tools/style-check.py in ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory — the automated form of the ratification checklist in docs/canonical-form-spec.md, promised '(when written)' by two docs since 2026-05-18. A single stdlib-only Python 3 script: check named artifact dirs, --all over canonical/{skills,agents,commands}/*/, --format json, and a built-in --self-test fixture suite (canonical/ holds zero artifacts today, so tempdir fixtures are the executable proof). Checks SC1–SC14 per the war game's table: frontmatter fields (name/description FAIL, argument-hint WARN, allowed-tools FAIL-if-bash-fenced-block-else-WARN), trigger-only description ('use when' + >=3 trigger phrases, <=2 sentences), marketing-word ban, stack-specific-term ban in body with <!-- stack-ok --> suppression, body <=400 lines or references/, David-style sections (Anti-patterns + Behavior-or-Modes FAIL, Output WARN), and layout existence only for provenance.json + _source/ (provenance CONTENT is verify-provenance.py, sibling T3-03 — out of scope). Report-only, no auto-fix, exit 0 pass / 1 any FAIL / 2 usage, empty library degrades to a friendly exit 0. Then remove the '(when written)' caveat in canonical-form-spec.md line 5 and point ingestion-workflow.md step 8 at the tool (wording per Fork F2 depending on whether verify-provenance.py exists yet), keeping every checklist bullet. Commit and push. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-04-style-check-tool.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: tools/style-check.py exists; python3 tools/style-check.py --self-test exits 0 with >=10 assertions all passing; --all exits 0 on the empty library (prints 'no artifacts found', JSON mode gives {"artifacts": [], "verdict": "pass"}) — or, if canonical artifacts landed first, produces a report without modifying anything under canonical/; a nonexistent path exits 2; a throwaway tempdir artifact with a workflow-summary description, 'npm test' in the body, no provenance.json and empty _source/ exits 1 with finding ids covering SC5, SC7, SC8, SC12, SC13. docs/canonical-form-spec.md no longer contains 'when written'; docs/ingestion-workflow.md step 8 names style-check.py and keeps all its checklist bullets. Negative: canonical/, research/ and engine/ untouched; no tools/verify-provenance.py created; no --fix/autofix code path; no fixture artifacts committed; no third-party imports (or the PyYAML fallback is documented in the result). Committed and pushed.
